items.title: Chasing a first Scottish title since 1960, Hearts ...
items.summary: Hearts are 90 minutes from a first Scottish title since 1960 -- also a first for a club outside Glasgow in over 40 years -- or sadness. Their fans are hoping this is the start,...
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: 32 and counting: Sinner’s story gets a record feel
items.summary: Jannik Sinner breaks Djokovic's 15-year record with 32 consecutive Masters wins, showcasing dominance in tennis as he aims for a historic Career Golden Masters.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
